steps.title: Story script
steps.intro: With a script, the pipeline builds the treatment and bible FROM it instead of inventing a story.
steps.prompt: Have a script or story outline? Drop it (.txt / .md) — optional

steps.title: Prepared characters
steps.intro: Reference images become the bible anchor for this character — the pipeline keeps it consistent instead of inventing a different one.
steps.addAnotherLabel: Add another character after this one

steps.title: Prepared locations
steps.intro: Reference images become the bible anchor for this location.
steps.addAnotherLabel: Add another location after this one

steps.title: Style references
steps.intro: Production design curates these as the style source.
steps.prompt: Drop any style / mood references — optional

steps.title: Track
steps.intro: Without the song there is no analysis.
steps.prompt: Drop your track or choose a file — .wav / .mp3 / .m4a / .aiff / .flac / .aac

steps.title: Lyrics
steps.intro: Lyrics label the measured sections. They never move the measured boundaries.
steps.prompt: Drop the lyrics (.txt) — optional, sharpens the section labels
